rates.note: A rise in front-end yields can tighten financial conditions.

title: 2025-08-13 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 4.39
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-08-13: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 4.39/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-08-13, the score printed 4.39/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
